meta.formula.yeast_pct.name: Yeast percentage (Formula L)
meta.formula.yeast_pct.desc: Calculates fresh yeast % based on rise duration, temperature, and reference hydration. Based on Casucci Formula L.
meta.formula.dough_temp.name: Final Dough Temperature (FDT)
meta.formula.dough_temp.desc: Weighted average of ingredient temperatures with 15% air incorporation and friction factor.
meta.formula.suggested_salt.name: Suggested salt
meta.formula.suggested_salt.desc: Suggests salt grams based on flour weight and hydration (2.0-3.0% range).
meta.factor_chain.rise_duration.name: Rise duration
meta.factor_chain.rise_duration.desc: Calculates rise time from flour W, yeast %, method, temperature, and inhibitors (salt, sugar, fat).
meta.piecewise.max_rise_hours.name: Max rise hours by flour W
meta.piecewise.max_rise_hours.desc: Maximum rise hours at room temperature based on flour W strength before gluten degradation.
meta.classification.flour_strength.name: Flour strength classification
meta.classification.flour_strength.desc: Classifies flour by W: weak (<180), medium (180-260), strong (260-350), very strong (>350).
variant.yeast.formula_l.desc: Classic Italian formula optimized for pizza napoletana (4-24h, 20-28°C).
variant.yeast.q10.desc: Temperature-based exponential model, better for long cold fermentation (24-98h, 2-12°C).
warning.yeast_too_low: Yeast too low ({{yeastPct}}%). Risk of no rise. Minimum recommended: 0.03%.
warning.yeast_too_high: Yeast very high ({{yeastPct}}%). Risk of off-flavor and rapid over-proofing. Max recommended: 3.5%.
warning.salt_low: Salt low ({{saltPct}}%) for {{recipeType}}. Recommended range: {{saltMin}}–{{saltMax}}%. Dough may be weak.
warning.salt_high: Salt high ({{saltPct}}%) for {{recipeType}}. Recommended range: {{saltMin}}–{{saltMax}}%. Inhibits yeast and too salty.
warning.salt_extreme: Salt very high ({{saltPct}}%). Above 3% yeast is strongly inhibited.
warning.fat_extreme: Fat above 12% strongly slows yeast. Requires special technique (add in phases).
warning.hyd_extreme: Very high hydration ({{hydration}}%). Requires very strong flour (W > 350) and advanced technique.
warning.hyd_low: Low hydration ({{hydration}}%). Dough will be very stiff.
warning.hours_extreme: Very long dough duration ({{doughHours}}h). Requires cold technique and strong flours.
warning.rise_too_long_for_w: Flour W{{flourW}} supports max {{maxH}}h at room temperature. Current duration: {{hours}}h.
warning.rise_too_short: Very short rise ({{durationMin}} min). The dough may not develop sufficiently.
validation.pre_ferment_pct_range: Pre-ferment percentage must be between 1% and 100%.
validation.pre_ferment_hyd_range: Pre-ferment hydration must be between 40% and 130%.
validation.pre_ferment_flour_exceeds: Pre-ferment requires more flour than available in the recipe.
validation.pre_ferment_liquid_exceeds: Pre-ferment requires more liquid than available in the recipe.
advisory.temp_low: Temperature {{ovenTemp}}°C is below the recommended range {{_tempMin}}–{{_tempMax}}°C for this product.
advisory.temp_high: Temperature {{ovenTemp}}°C is above the recommended range {{_tempMin}}–{{_tempMax}}°C for this product.
advisory.cielo_too_low: Heat concentrated on the base ({{cieloPct}}%). Recommended top heat: {{_cieloMin}}–{{_cieloMax}}%.
advisory.cielo_too_high: Heat concentrated on top ({{cieloPct}}%). Recommended top heat: {{_cieloMin}}–{{_cieloMax}}%.
advisory.mode_not_recommended: Fan mode can dry out the dough. Consider static or steam mode.
advisory.double_bake_hint: This product typically requires a par-bake followed by a second bake with toppings.
advisory.steam_with_pizza: Steam is not recommended for pizza. It compromises the crispness of the base.
advisory.steam_too_long: Steam at {{steamPct}}% for {{baseDur}} min. Beyond 30 min, steam can make the crust rubbery.
advisory.pentola_no_lid: Dutch oven without lid: oven spring will be reduced (30-50%). Bread develops better volume and crust starting with the lid on for the first 20-25 minutes.
advisory.pentola_two_phase: Dutch oven: ~25 min covered (oven spring) + ~15 min uncovered (browning). Remove lid when bread stops rising.
advisory.fry_oil_temp_low: Oil below 170°C: dough absorbs too much oil and becomes greasy.
advisory.fry_oil_temp_high: Oil above 195°C: risk of burning outside while raw inside.
advisory.fry_dough_too_heavy: Dough weight too high (max recommended: {{_maxDoughWeight}}g). Risk of uneven cooking.
advisory.fry_finish_suggest: Fried pizza: to melt cheese, add an oven finish phase.
advisory.grill_flareup: Avoid fats dripping onto direct flame. Do not grill next to meat.
advisory.grill_dock_hint: For thin-crust grilled pizza, consider docking the dough before grilling.
advisory.airfry_large_pizza: Air fryer is not suitable for large pizzas (max ~22cm). Use small pieces or mini pizzas.
advisory.airfry_flip_reminder: Remember to flip halfway through for an even crust.
advisory.steamer_water_low: Steam cooking > 15 min: check the water level in the steamer.
advisory.steamer_lid_condensation: At the end of cooking, open the lid gradually to avoid condensation dripping onto the product.
advisory.pan_cast_iron_preheat: Cast iron pan: preheat well (at least 5 minutes) for even cooking.
advisory.pan_finish_suggest: Pan pizza: to brown the top, add a grill/broil finish phase.
advisory.boil_lye_safety: Lye solution requires protective gloves and adequate ventilation. Handle with extreme care.
advisory.boil_overcook: Boiling beyond 3 minutes can make the product too chewy.
advisory.boil_must_bake_after: Boiling MUST be followed by oven baking to complete the product.
advisory.dock_not_for_neapolitan: Docking is not suitable for Neapolitan pizza: it compromises the cornicione rise.
advisory.flour_tipo00_burns: Tipo 00 flour is too fine: it burns easily and alters the flavor. Prefer rice flour or semola.
advisory.flour_excess_remove: Remove excess flour before baking to prevent burning.
advisory.oil_evoo_high_heat: EVOO with high-temperature baking (>220°C): consider an oil with a higher smoke point.
advisory.steam_home_oven_only: Water pan / ice cubes: a technique for home ovens without native steam injection.
advisory.steam_remove_for_crust: Remove the steam source in the final baking phase for a crispy crust.
advisory.flour_w_too_weak: Flour W{{flourW}} may be too weak for long fermentations. Consider a stronger flour.
action.split_steam_phases.desc: Reduces steam phase to 25 min and adds a 12 min browning phase without steam.
action.split_steam_phases_pentola.desc: Adds a 12 min browning phase without lid.
action.reduce_steam_pct.desc: Lowers steam to 50% to reduce humidity without removing it completely.
action.lower_temp_keep_steam.desc: Reduce to 210°C keeping steam. Crust develops more slowly.
action.add_pentola_uncovered.desc: Adds a browning phase with lid off (15 min, static mode).
meta.formula.estimate_W.name: Estimate W from protein
meta.formula.bake_dur_oven.name: Bake duration (oven)
meta.formula.bake_dur_oven.desc: Bake time for oven-based methods (forno, pentola) with temp, material, and thickness factors.
meta.formula.rise_temp_factor.name: Rise temperature factor
meta.formula.rise_temp_factor.desc: Q10-inspired exponential factor: warmer = faster rise, cooler = slower.
meta.catalog.flours.name: Flour catalog
meta.catalog.flours.desc: 28 flour types with W, protein, P/L, absorption, ash, fiber, starch damage, ferment speed.
meta.catalog.baking_profiles.name: Baking profiles
meta.catalog.baking_profiles.desc: Temperature ranges, material factors, and time ranges per recipe type/subtype.
meta.catalog.fats.name: Fat catalog
meta.catalog.fats.desc: Oils and solid fats with ferment effect, water content, smoke point, fryable flag.
meta.catalog.rise_methods.name: Rise methods & yeast types
meta.catalog.rise_methods.desc: Rise methods (room, fridge, controlled) with time factors; yeast types with conversion ratios.
meta.catalog.salts_sugars.name: Salt & sugar catalog
meta.catalog.salts_sugars.desc: Salt types and sugar types with sweetness and ferment effect multipliers.
meta.catalog.oven_config.name: Oven configuration
meta.catalog.oven_config.desc: Oven types, modes, and mode compatibility matrix.
meta.defaults.dough.name: Dough composition defaults
meta.defaults.dough.desc: Default salt%, fat%, dough hours per recipe type/subtype (pizza, pane, focaccia, dolce).
meta.rule.yeast_too_low.name: Yeast too low
meta.rule.yeast_too_low.desc: Error when yeast is below 0.03% — risk of no rise.
meta.rule.yeast_too_high.name: Yeast too high
meta.rule.yeast_too_high.desc: Warning when yeast exceeds 3.5% — off-flavor risk.
meta.rule.salt_low.name: Salt low
meta.rule.salt_low.desc: Warning when salt is below recommended range for recipe type.
meta.rule.salt_high.name: Salt high
meta.rule.salt_high.desc: Warning when salt exceeds recommended range for recipe type.
meta.rule.salt_extreme.name: Salt extreme
meta.rule.salt_extreme.desc: Error when salt exceeds 3% — strong yeast inhibition.
meta.rule.fat_high.name: Fat high
meta.rule.fat_high.desc: Warning when fat exceeds recommended range for recipe type.
meta.rule.fat_extreme.name: Fat extreme
meta.rule.fat_extreme.desc: Warning when fat exceeds 12% (except dolce) — requires multi-phase technique.
meta.rule.hyd_extreme.name: Hydration extreme
meta.rule.hyd_extreme.desc: Warning when hydration exceeds 90% — requires W>350 and advanced technique.
meta.rule.hyd_low.name: Hydration low
meta.rule.hyd_low.desc: Info when hydration is below 45% — very stiff dough.
meta.rule.hours_extreme.name: Duration extreme
meta.rule.hours_extreme.desc: Info when dough duration exceeds 72h — requires cold technique.
flour_w_max_rise: Flour W{{W}} supports max {{maxH}}h of rise. "{{riseTitle}}" is set to {{riseHours}}h.
autolisi_preferment_hyd: Autolyse + pre-ferment with {{hydration}}% hydration. Consider reducing by 2 points (Casucci, Ch. 32).
tip_flour_strong: Strong flour: long kneading, excellent for prolonged fermentations
tip_flour_weak: Weak flour: limit fermentation to max 2-3h
tip_flour_high_protein: High protein content: knead thoroughly to develop gluten
tip_flour_low_falling: Low Falling Number: high enzymatic activity, reduce fermentation times
tip_flour_high_fiber: High fiber content: increase hydration and kneading times
tip_salt_high: High salt ({{pct}}%): may excessively slow down fermentation
tip_sugar_high: High sugar ({{pct}}%): fermentation will be significantly slowed
tip_fat_high: High fat ({{pct}}%): add fat after the first strengthening
tip_fat_butter_water: Butter contains ~15% water: effective hydration is slightly higher
tip_rise_weak_long: Weak flour with long fermentation: risk of over-proofing
tip_rise_high_enzyme: High enzymatic activity: check fermentation frequently
meta.piecewise.min_ferm_hours.name: Min fermentation hours by flour W
meta.piecewise.min_ferm_hours.desc: Minimum equivalent room-temperature fermentation hours based on flour W for proper gluten development.
meta.rule.total_fermentation_mismatch.de: Warning when equivalent fermentation hours differ >30% from portioning doughHours.
meta.rule.rise_phases_insufficient.name: Rise phases insufficient
meta.rule.rise_phases_insufficient.desc: Error when total equivalent fermentation is below minimum for flour W.
meta.rule.cold_rise_too_long.name: Cold rise too long
meta.rule.cold_rise_too_long.desc: Warning when a fridge rise exceeds 72 wall-clock hours — over-fermentation risk.
meta.rule.acclimatization_missing.name: Acclimatization missing
meta.rule.acclimatization_missing.desc: Info when a fridge rise is followed directly by bake without room-temp phase.
meta.rule.equiv_time_exceeds_w.name: Equivalent time exceeds W capacity
meta.rule.equiv_time_exceeds_w.desc: Warning when total equivalent room hours exceed flour W maximum rise capacity.
meta.rule.yeast_portioning_mismatch.name: Yeast % mismatch
meta.rule.yeast_portioning_mismatch.desc: Warning when portioning yeast% differs >20% from expected yeast% for actual graph phases.
warning.total_fermentation_mismatch: Fermentation time mismatch: graph phases total {{equivalentRoomHours}}h equivalent, but settings expect {{doughHours}}h ({{mismatchPct}}% difference).
warning.rise_phases_insufficient: Insufficient fermentation: only {{equivalentRoomHours}}h equivalent remain. Flour W{{flourW}} needs at least {{minHoursForW}}h.
warning.cold_rise_too_long: Fridge rise exceeds {{maxFridgeWallHours}}h. Even with minimal yeast, over-fermentation is likely after 72h.
warning.acclimatization_missing: No room-temperature phase after fridge rise "{{fridgeNodeTitle}}". Dough needs 30–60 min to warm up before baking.
warning.equivalent_time_exceeds_w_capaci: Total equivalent fermentation ({{equivalentRoomHours}}h) exceeds flour W{{flourW}} capacity (max {{maxHoursForW}}h). Gluten network may degrade.
warning.yeast_portioning_mismatch: Yeast % mismatch: settings have {{actualYeastPct}}% but actual graph phases suggest {{expectedYeastPct}}%.
action.sync_dough_hours.desc: Update portioning doughHours to match the actual graph rise phases.
action.add_acclimatization.desc: Add a 45-minute room-temperature rise after the fridge phase for dough acclimatization.
action.sync_yeast_pct.desc: Update portioning yeast% to match the expected value for current graph phases.
meta.formula.yeast_w_correction.name: Yeast W correction factor
meta.formula.yeast_w_correction.desc: Adjusts yeast percentage based on flour W strength. Higher W tolerates longer fermentation with less yeast.
variant.yeast_w.linear_280.desc: Linear correction: factor = 280/W, clamped [0.6, 2.0]. W280 is neutral.
warning.flour_w_low_long_ferment: Flour W{{flourW}} is weak for {{doughHours}}h fermentation. Flours below W180 degrade after 24h. Use a stronger flour or shorten fermentation.
warning.flour_w_high_low_hyd: Strong flour (W{{flourW}}) with low hydration ({{hydration}}%). Strong flours need more water to develop gluten properly. Consider increasing hydration.
warning.gluten_free_with_yeast: Gluten-free flour with yeast ({{yeastPct}}%). Without gluten, the dough cannot trap CO2 and will not rise. Use a gluten-containing flour or a chemical leavener.
warning.whole_grain_needs_hydration: High whole-grain content ({{_wholeGrainPct}}%) with only {{hydration}}% hydration. Bran absorbs more water — increase hydration by 5-10%.
meta.rule.flour_w_low_long_ferment.name: Weak flour with long fermentation
meta.rule.flour_w_low_long_ferment.desc: Warns when flour W < 180 is used with fermentation > 24h.
meta.rule.flour_w_high_low_hyd.name: Strong flour with low hydration
meta.rule.flour_w_high_low_hyd.desc: Informs when strong flour needs more hydration.
meta.rule.gluten_free_with_yeast.name: Gluten-free flour with yeast
meta.rule.gluten_free_with_yeast.desc: Error when gluten-free flour is mixed with yeast.
meta.rule.whole_grain_needs_hydration.de: Informs when whole grain needs higher hydration.
warning_graph_cycle: The graph contains a cycle: nodes cannot be sorted. Remove the circular connection.
warning_sauce_emulsion_temp_high: Emulsion temperature too high ({{temp}}°C). Above 70°C emulsions risk breaking.
warning_sauce_reduction_over: Over-reduced: volume dropped below 20% of original. Risk of burning and bitter flavor.
warning_sauce_pesto_oxidation: Pesto oxidizes rapidly: work quickly and cover with a thin layer of oil.
warning_sauce_marinade_acid_long: Acidic marinade over 24h: proteins break down and texture becomes rubbery.
warning_ferment_salt_low_botulism: Salt below 2% in lacto-fermentation: botulism risk. Use at least 2-3% salt by vegetable weight.
warning_ferment_ph_high: pH too high ({{ph}}). For food safety pH must drop below 4.6 within 48h.
warning_ferment_temp_high: Fermentation temperature {{temp}}°C too high. Above 35°C lactic bacteria slow down and pathogens proliferate.
warning_ferment_vessel_not_airtight: Non-airtight vessel for anaerobic fermentation: use an airlock or valve-lid.
warning_ferment_starter_ratio_low: Starter ratio too low ({{ratio}}%). At least 2-5% is needed to initiate fermentation safely.
warning_pastry_ganache_ratio: Unbalanced chocolate/cream ratio ({{ratio}}). For stable ganache: dark 2:1, milk 2.5:1, white 3:1.
warning_pastry_temper_curve: Tempering curve not followed: dark 50→27→31°C, milk 45→26→29°C, white 40→25→27°C.
warning_pastry_meringue_fat_contact: Meringue will not whip if in contact with fat. Ensure bowl and whisk are grease-free.
warning_pastry_cream_curdling: Cream at risk of curdling: add hot liquids gradually and stir constantly.
warning_pastry_chilling_too_fast: Cooling too quickly: thermal shock can cause cracks in tempered chocolate.
warning_prep_cross_contamination: Cross-contamination risk: use separate cutting boards and utensils for raw meat and vegetables.
warning_prep_oxidation: Ingredient oxidizes rapidly after cutting. Store in acidulated water or work quickly.
